targetUrlNote: As-provided value had a doubled https:// scheme; normalized to a single scheme.
targetOwnership: Authorized by Bae / Seunghun Bae for safe QA testing. Separate golf-now app — NOT Simsa, NOT app.trysimsa.com, NOT the central-plane Worker.
intentAnchor: A golfer should be able to open the app, understand that it helps check current golf course conditions, and start a core flow for checking whether a course or round is playable now.
coreFlow: identify the primary CTA or primary input related to checking golf course/current playability conditions
click the primary CTA or interact with the primary input if safe
observe whether the app advances to a usable next screen, search/result state, course-condition view, or clear next step
forbiddenActions: account creation with real personal data

repoContext.note: Read-only inspection of localRepoPath to ground the Fix Brief (no golf-now code modified).
repoContext.finding: golf-now reads its backend from process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL (see src/lib/supabase/*). The deployed app's browser requests to its Supabase REST host fail with ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED, i.e. the configured Supabase host does not resolve (paused/deleted project or stale deploy env).
